summary: Independent QA accepts the M7 historical, cultural, and language review baseline. The baseline is review-gate/process evidence only: it records source discipline, claim labels, candidate-source limits, cultural-risk and violence-cost Human Gate routing, language/name/title gates, no modern-nationalist shortcut checks, no unsupported formal certainty, zero accepted Beta real-world claims, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, and exact DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation. It does not approve formal content lock.

tests_run.result: Before QA handoff creation, worktree showed only unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md; no staged changes.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse HEAD; git merge-base origin/main HEAD; git log --oneline --decorate --max-count=8
tests_run.result: Actual reviewed HEAD was e9d08b6e on research/m7-historical-cultural-language-review, base was 4c434b3c, and the writer content commit afbfad51 plus route/process commits through e9d08b6e were present.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-status origin/main...HEAD; independent changed-path scope guard
tests_run.result: 11 changed files, all within allowed paths. Forbidden path set was empty. docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md was untracked only, not staged and not in the diff.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is the only ready task while this task is in REVIEW.
Existing content packs validated; M7 baseline is not compiled as formal content, consistent with review-gate-only scope.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape and M7 baseline invariant check
tests_run.result: Parsed 7 JSON artifacts; baseline has 10 source records, 8 claim records, zero accepted Beta real-world claims, PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation. Candidate academic sources remain BIBLIOGRAPHIC_METADATA_ONLY with pageOrSection RESEARCH REQUIRED.

Matched required invariants in the baseline, task JSON, and tests: formal lock stays future Human Gate, accepted Beta claims are empty, modern-national shortcuts are rejected, violence-cost gates mention victim and long-term consequences, and Human Gate routing is explicit.

decisions: ACCEPT: the M7 review baseline exists before formal content fill and covers historical claims, cultural representation, language strings, names, titles, symbols, uncertainty labels, bias scans, and downstream gates.
ACCEPT: the baseline records zero accepted Beta real-world claims; later real-world claims must attach source records and labels or remain RESEARCH REQUIRED.
ACCEPT: external academic works are recorded only as candidate sources when page-level verification is absent; the baseline does not falsely mark metadata-only sources as formal evidence.

ACCEPT: contested/high-risk identity, mandala, violence-cost, language/name/title, symbol/art/music, and religion records include uncertainty labels, competing interpretations or RESEARCH REQUIRED handling, and Human Gate routing where major unresolved risk exists.
ACCEPT: no modern-nationalist identity shortcut, fixed culture buff, cost-free coercion reward, or unsupported certainty was introduced by the baseline.
ACCEPT: formal content lock acceptance remains a future Human Gate; acceptedBetaRealWorldClaims is empty and notContentLockAcceptance is true.
ACCEPT: M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is preserved exactly.
risks: This acceptance covers the review baseline only. It does not accept any later scenario/person/event record, name, title, symbol, art, audio, localization string, cultural-risk decision, or formal M7 content lock.

Actual HEAD e9d08b6e includes one additional QA route/process commit after the route file's recorded review_head_commit 0a5d0eec. QA reviewed origin/main...HEAD; the extra delta is limited to allowed route/process metadata and is not a blocker.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator should validate this QA handoff, run integration gates, and integrate/close M7-HISTORICAL-CULTURAL-LANGUAGE-REVIEW-001 if gates remain clean. Do not treat this ACCEPT as formal content lock acceptance.
